channel.title: math.GN updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: math.GN updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: The converse to Borsuk's result on fans fails
item.description: arXiv:2604.12517v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: A fan is an arc-wise connected hereditarily unicoherent continuum with exactly one branching point. By a result of Borsuk, every fan is a 1-dimensional continuum that can be expressed as the union of a family of arcs, each pair of which intersects in the branching point. In this paper, we prove that the converse does not hold by providing a more general result.
item.dc:creator: Benjamin Vejnar
